# Human Approval

Approval is required before global package installation, remote installers, credentialed MCP servers, copying third-party material into active configuration, modifying hooks, deleting files, or applying self-generated rules or skills. Record high-impact decisions in evidence.
<!-- END CASOPS MANAGED CONTENT -->
